channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tipping, 30th March
item.description:
Good Afternoon, Hope you are well. Today at 1a Thayers farm road ( Carew curt and Wessex Court car park) I have challenged 3 males for fly typing at our carpark and been told that the council has advised them to dispose of at this location. I’m fully aware this is not the case and it’s totally unacceptable for the residents to deal with the waste and cost of disposal. I have attached pictures of the car and 3 males that did this and would appreciate if you could deal with that and challenge these people for what they did.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thayers Farm Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken/missing drain grilles, 30th March
item.description:
By the Bus Stop outside Waitrose N12, there are broken/damaged/missing drainage channel metal grilles. These are very dangerous, especially to two wheeled vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 282, Ballards Lane, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 30th March
item.description:
Paladin in Bloomfield rd carpark overflowing and mattress dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conduit Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 30th March
item.description:
A car has been abandoned within a private car park serving the Chandlers Wharf (One) residential blocks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crumbling road deteriorating and creating deeper and deeper hole, 30th March
item.description:
The road is crumbling away and getting worse. Stones / dirt have been cleared / removed and the hole is now quite significant. It is falling away where old/new tarmac once was. Clear crumbling and obvious lower quality of older tarmac / road. Both aesthetically unsatisfying but also starting to cause a problem with driveway access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bevington Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flag tangled up in tree, 30th March
item.description:
The tree between 365 and 361 Sutherland avenue has a flag that has partially become detached from lampost and caught up in this tree I can consider it a hazard to traffic if it became fully detached in strong winds it would be nice to have it removed apart from anything else it is an eyesore to look out on. Regards
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 30th March
item.description:
Tin of paint, bicycle pump and other letters and documents blowing along street JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car with flat tyre, 30th March
item.description:
Been parked here for over 2 weeks damage to drivers side, flat tyre and parked badly on 'A' road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly parked ebikes that block road and pavement, 30th March
item.description:
There are a big number of badly parked ebikes from Lime, Forest, Voi on this street. They nearly blocked the pavement and prevent people walking passing safely. This has posed a risk of injury and affect local businesses on the road. This is ongoing problem day &night and hope our council can tackle it as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Newport Street, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping of boxes Lionel Rd Hall, 30th March
item.description:
Multiple boxes left by our community hall bins found this morning.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking bay outside 97 Malvern Road, 30th March
item.description:
Surface of parking bay is badly worn away leaving it very uneven and turning to mud in places.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road outside 97 Malvern Road, 30th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes along and across the road covering an area about 4 metres by 2 metres. There are so many they're difficult to avoid even when driving slowly, and they're deep enough to make the car bounce and shudder. They're difficult for cyclists to avoid too, and this is a well used cycle route.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need trees cut, 30th March
item.description:
Need trees cut as over hanging and blocking light

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Greenwood Close, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branch touching telephone line, 30th March
item.description:
There is a tree outside my house 38 Kimberley Drive and a branch is touching the telephone line going to my house. In the strong winds it is actually whipping the cable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Kimberley Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess footbal pitch, 30th March
item.description:
Dog mess
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerford Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess footbal pitch, 30th March
item.description:
Dog mess
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerford Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking bay outside No's 93-95 Malvern Road, 30th March
item.description:
Parking bay road surface is worn away, leaving it pitted and very uneven, and prone to flooding. Please repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish from shops littered along street, 30th March
item.description:
Why are we paying our council tax when you are allowing the shops along Plumstead Road on the woolwich market side to strew along the road!! IT’s left out for several days every week and litters the streets. Yet you have environment enforcement offices fining (apparently) people that are dropping litter. This extremely frustrating that this constantly happens! When we are trying to keep our streets clean you are allowing this to go on!! Very demoralising! Fix it! The shops are open and can see this is now in the roads causing traffic jams and will cause an accident. And the council offices are just up the road, surely they should be monitoring this!!??
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road outside 95 Malvern Road, 30th March
item.description:
Multiple potholes all along and across the road outside No 95 covering an area about 4 metres by 2 metres. There are so many it's difficult for drivers to avoid them all, and they're deep enough to make a car being driven slowly bounce and shudder. It's also difficult for cyclists to avoid them, and dangerous if they swerve to try to do so, and this is a well used cycle route. Please repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped outside Manor Estate, 30th March
item.description:
Please removve? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roseberry Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
